name: Kapusta Kiszona z Grzybami (Stewed Sauerkraut
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried mushrooms in 1/2 cup of warm water for 1 hour.
2. Sauté the mushrooms and onion in butter in a skillet for 3 minutes.
3. Add sauerkraut to the mushrooms; cook and stir for 10 minutes.
4. Blend 1/3 cup water into flour.
5. Mix with sauerkraut and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. I usually like to add 1/4 cup of dark rum after cooking. That reminds me of the recipe I have for bigos (similar in construction but with more ingredients).
